creator: wolf@digris.ch
text:
As TKMIB has become a mandatory part of , we are forced to install dozens of X11 libs and graphics libraries for all our SNMP.managed servers. Currently 11 machines with around 10 jails each. Do we really have to do this?

Fix: 

Revert the change made in version 1.181 of /ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/Makefile

-		TKMIB "Install graphical MIB browser" off \
-.if !defined(WITH_TKMIB)
-EXTRA_PATCHES+=	${PATCHDIR}/extra-patch-local:Makefile.in
-PLIST_SUB+=	WITH_TKMIB="@comment "
-.else
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	${SITE_PERL}/${PERL_ARCH}/Tk.pm:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk
-PLIST_SUB+=	WITH_TKMIB=""
-.endif
-.if defined(WITH_TKMIB)
-SCRIPT_FILES+=	tkmib
-.endif
How-To-Repeat: Update your ports-tree

portmanager --status --pristine

..
